'''''Evil Never Dies: The Sith Dynasties''''' is an online supplement to [[Star Wars Insider 88|''Star Wars Insider'' 88]]. The article is written by [[Abel G. Peña]], and is an exclusive [[Hyperspace: The Official Star Wars Fan Club|Hyperspace]] publication. The article presented the history of the [[Sith/Legends|Sith]], comprehensively collating and expanding upon information from sources published prior to the articles [[2006]] release.
